design_philosophy.core_concept: Fuse the trustworthiness of a global charity with the energy of a fitness tracker. The aesthetic must feel 'sun-baked' and organic, not sterile and digital.

textures: Use subtle noise or grain on the body background (opacity 0.02)
Use topographic map lines as faint background patterns in hero sections

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white shadow-lg shadow-orange-600/20 font-medium px-8 py-6 h-auto transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-stone-100 hover:bg-stone-200 text-stone-900 font-medium px-6 py-6 h-auto
buttons.outline: rounded-full border-2 border-stone-200 hover:border-orange-600 hover:text-orange-600 bg-transparent

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: rounded-xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 focus:border-orange-500 transition-all h-12

layout_strategies.mobile_first: Always stack columns on mobile (grid-cols-1), expand to md:grid-cols-2 or lg:grid-cols-3

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'stone' and 'kef' color palettes immediately.
2. FONT: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html and update index.css body font-family.
3. SHADOWS: Use the custom shadow values for cards. Do not use default shadows.
4. IMAGERY: Use 'students_impact' images for the 'Why KEF?' section and 'walkers_community' for the 'Join the Challenge' section.
5. MAP: For the Route Progress page, use the 'route_map_placeholder' as the background image and overlay a CSS SVG path with a progress marker.
6. CHARTS: Use 'recharts' with the custom 'kef' color palette (Orange for user, Stone for average).
7. TESTIDS: Every button, input, and link MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-btn').
8. RESPONSIVE: Mobile navigation must be a Sidebar/Drawer, not a hamburger menu that pushes content down.
9. NO GENERIC TITLES: Do not use 'Dashboard' as a title. Use 'Habari, [Name]' (Hello in Swahili) or 'Your Journey'.

do_not: DO NOT use generic pure blue (#3b82f6) for primary actions.
DO NOT use text-black (#000000). Use text-stone-900.
must_do: MUST use adequate whitespace (py-16+ for sections).
MUST use subtle entrance animations for cards (fade-in-up).
MUST show currency in KEF context (e.g., '$50 provides 1 month of education').
